chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-765 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on M.A. No.5284/2022 13.04.2022 Mr. Shahnawaz Brohi, Advocate for the petitioner. == Urgency is granted. The petitioner by way of instant petition which is filed in year 2022 has sought for direction against the respondents to mutate the revenue record in his name for the subject land for the reason that he has purchased the same through a registered sale deed in year 2013. The mutation of record of rights is involving factual controversy, therefore, the direction sought for by the petitioner could not be issued by this Court in exercise of its constitutional jurisdiction; consequently the instant petition being misconceived is dismissed in limine which even otherwise is hit by laches. J U D G E J U D G E Muhammad Danish*
